title: [FIRRTL][Dedup] Fix issue with NLAs on ExtModule ports
body:
ExtModule deduping has an optimized version of NLA fixup where it
assumes that the ExtModule is the last element of the NLA, since there
can be no wires or other instances inside the body.  This function was
assuming that the NLA was a module reference and would accidentally take
port references and change them into a module references.

Properly managing port references in NLAs involves tracking the merging
or renaming of port symbols between the two modules.  Since this is a
bit tricky, the best thing to do is use the same NLA fixup code used on
regular modules.

This change also makes some port annotation tests stronger by using
different names between the two deduped modules: no code-changes were
required for this.
